UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Basic information about the user, collected during sign-up.

uid.description: The unique identifier for the user (Firebase Auth UID).

role.description: The user's job title or role.

industry.description: The industry the user works in.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the profile was created.

/users/{uid}.description: Stores user profile information, keyed by their Firebase Auth UID.
